prompts.task: Add OpenTelemetry instrumentation to the Go chi service in ./service. Assume no custom business spans are requested.
Instrument the Go chi service in ./service with OpenTelemetry while preserving the existing runtime and startup command. Add auto-instrumentation only; do not add custom business spans.

deterministic_checks.description: OTel initialization is placed in a separate Go file.
Application entry point wires OTel middleware or setup.
Final response reports build or verification outcome.

qualitative_checks: Confirms target process, runtime shape, service.name source, and environment dimension before editing.
Initializes the SDK exactly once and sets tracer provider and text map propagator.
Uses route-aware, low-cardinality HTTP spans and preserves chi routing behavior.
Keeps OTLP endpoint and service name configurable through environment variables.
Does not introduce broad refactors or custom spans beyond the requested auto-instrumentation.
